title: christella cyatheoides
intro: Christella cyatheoides, also known as the basket fern, is a type of non-vascular, epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Christella cyatheoides include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and phenolic compounds in the plant. The health benefits of Christella cyatheoides include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Christella cyatheoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
